type_rationale: 本主題為單一迷思破解型，核心在於翻轉「飯菜要放涼才能進冰箱」的傳統觀念，透過科學證據說明細菌危險溫度帶，敘事結構清晰，適合 standard 型態以故事線引導觀眾從迷思走向正確做法。
topic_title: 飯菜要冷了才能放冰箱嗎？
core_claim: 熱飯菜放涼再冰反而更危險，食物在室溫下超過 2 小時就進入細菌快速繁殖的危險溫度帶（7-60°C），現代冰箱完全能承受溫熱食物，應盡快冷藏才安全。
audience_promise: 看完你會知道飯菜到底該不該放涼再冰，以及最安全的保存方式
hook_text: 飯菜放涼再冰？大錯特錯！

hook_variants.text: 熱飯菜直接放冰箱，會壞掉嗎？
hook_variants.rationale: 針對從未質疑過此習慣的觀眾，以疑問句引發好奇。

hook_variants.text: 飯菜放涼才能冰？你可能放出一堆細菌！
hook_variants.rationale: 針對知道食物保存很重要但仍遵循舊觀念的觀眾，點出風險。

hook_variants.text: FDA 早說了：熱菜要趁早冰！
hook_variants.rationale: 針對已有食安意識的觀眾，用權威背書強化信心。

hook_variants.text: 阿嬤堅持放涼再冰？科學說不對！
hook_variants.rationale: 直接點名長輩習慣，製造世代認知衝突的好奇感。

character: 一位約 60 歲的家庭主婦，在自家整潔明亮的廚房中，剛煮好一鍋湯，正猶豫要不要等放涼再冰。

research_sources.citation: U.S. FDA — Are You Storing Food Safely?
research_sources.key_finding: 熟食應在烹煮後 2 小時內冷藏（室溫超過 32°C 則為 1 小時），不應在室溫下放置過久。

research_sources.citation: USDA Food Safety and Inspection Service — Danger Zone (40°F - 140°F)
research_sources.key_finding: 細菌在 4-60°C（40-140°F）的危險溫度帶中每 20 分鐘可倍增，2 小時內可從少量繁殖至致病劑量。

research_sources.citation: 台灣衛福部食藥署 — 食品保存與冷藏建議
research_sources.key_finding: 建議熟食儘速冷藏，大量食物可分裝小容器加速降溫，冰箱溫度應維持在 7°C 以下。

scenes.scene_goal: 引發觀眾對「飯菜放涼再冰」這個根深柢固習慣的質疑。
scenes.on_screen_text_sub: 這個習慣可能讓你吃進滿滿細菌

scenes.background_scene: warm modern kitchen interior, clean countertop, soft natural light from window, cream and sage color palette
scenes.mascot_interaction_mode: 站在湯鍋旁邊，驚訝地看著冒出的蒸氣

scenes.scene_goal: 翻轉觀眾認知：放涼的過程才是細菌繁殖的溫床。
scenes.on_screen_text_sub: 室溫 2 小時，細菌暴增數萬倍
scenes.hero_object: Left side: a freshly cooked hot dish with steam, looking clean and safe, with a green checkmark. Right side: the same dish sitting at room temperature with a clock showing 2 hours passed, with cartoon-style tiny bacteria icons multiplying around it, with a red X mark. Split comparison layout, realistic food photography style.
scenes.background_scene: clean kitchen countertop, neutral warm lighting, cream background

scenes.scene_goal: 用溫度帶圖解讓觀眾理解細菌危險區間的科學原理。
scenes.on_screen_text_sub: 細菌每 20 分鐘倍增一次
scenes.hero_object: A large vertical thermometer in the center, with three color-coded zones: blue zone at bottom (below 7°C, labeled safe/冷藏安全), red danger zone in middle (7-60°C, with bacteria icons), and orange zone at top (above 60°C, labeled safe/加熱安全). Clean infographic style, realistic thermometer with stylized zones.
scenes.background_scene: clean minimal background, cream and sage color palette, soft gradient

scenes.scene_goal: 提供權威機構建議與正確做法，增強說服力。
scenes.on_screen_text_sub: 大鍋菜分小盒，降溫更快更安全
scenes.hero_object: Three small glass food containers with lids, each containing different portions of hot food (soup, rice, stir-fry), arranged neatly on a countertop next to an open refrigerator. Steam slightly visible from containers. Clean, organized, practical kitchen scene.
scenes.background_scene: modern kitchen with open refrigerator visible in background, bright clean lighting, cream and sage color palette

scenes.scene_goal: 提醒觀眾冰箱使用的注意事項，避免矯枉過正。
scenes.on_screen_text_sub: 冰箱別塞太滿，保持冷氣流通
scenes.hero_object: A well-organized refrigerator interior, showing proper food storage with adequate spacing between containers, temperature display showing 4°C, clean and organized shelves with labeled containers. Bright, clean, inviting.
scenes.background_scene: clean refrigerator interior with soft cool lighting, cream and sage accents on container lids

scenes.scene_goal: 強化品牌記憶，溫馨告別。
scenes.on_screen_text_sub: 嗨，我是小靜，我們下次見！

seedance_prompts.seedance_part1: A kitchen scene: a pot of hot soup sits on a countertop with visible steam. Time-lapse effect shows a clock spinning from 0 to 2 hours. As time passes, stylized cartoon bacteria icons begin appearing and multiplying around the pot, growing from a few to thousands. The scene shifts to show a large thermometer with a glowing red danger zone between 7-60°C. Clean, informative animation style, warm kitchen lighting. No text, no watermarks, no logos.
seedance_prompts.seedance_part2: A practical kitchen scene: hands divide a large pot of soup into three small glass containers with lids. The containers are placed into a clean, well-organized refrigerator. The refrigerator temperature display shows 4°C. A green checkmark appears. The scene transitions to a clean cream and sage colored background with the 3D mascot (a Taiwanese leopard cat toy figure wearing a sage green apron) waving goodbye warmly. No text, no watermarks, no logos.

segments.text: 飯菜要放涼才能進冰箱？這個習慣，可能讓你吃進滿滿細菌！
很多人怕熱菜會壞冰箱，但其實放在室溫才更危險。食物只要在室溫超過兩小時，細菌就會瘋狂繁殖！
關鍵在這個危險溫度帶。七度到六十度之間，細菌每二十分鐘就能倍增一次。放涼的過程，剛好就在這個區間裡。
美國 FDA 跟台灣食藥署都建議，熟食煮好後應盡快冷藏。大鍋菜可以分裝成小盒，降溫更快，也更安全。
記住，煮好趁早冰，別傻傻等放涼。冰箱也別塞太滿，要保持冷氣流通才有效。
時時靜好，祝您健康，我們下次見！

sound: 廚房環境音，湯鍋冒泡聲、冰箱開關門聲、保鮮盒蓋上的輕微聲響
music: 溫暖輕快的烏克麗麗配樂，節奏明朗但不急促，烘托居家溫馨感

youtube_metadata.title: 飯菜放涼再冰？大錯特錯！細菌兩小時暴增數萬倍｜時時靜好 #Shorts
youtube_metadata.description:
「飯菜要放涼才能放冰箱」是許多家庭根深柢固的習慣，但這個做法其實超級危險！食物在室溫下放置超過 2 小時，就會進入 7-60°C 的細菌危險溫度帶，細菌每 20 分鐘倍增一次。美國 FDA 和台灣食藥署都建議：熟食煮好後應盡快冷藏，大鍋菜分裝小容器可加速降溫。現代冰箱完全能承受溫熱食物，別再等放涼了！

資料來源：
1. U.S. FDA — Are You Storing Food Safely?
2. USDA Food Safety and Inspection Service — Danger Zone (40°F - 140°F)
3. 台灣衛福部食藥署 — 食品保存與冷藏建議
